metadata.description: Contoso Engineering Plugin Marketplace — curated AI plugins for coding standards, domain expertise, and technology-specific development workflows.

plugins.name: contoso-code-review
plugins.description: Automated code review with Contoso coding standards enforcement, PR analysis, and improvement suggestions.

plugins.name: contoso-documentation
plugins.description: Generate and maintain API docs, READMEs, and architecture decision records following Contoso documentation standards.

plugins.name: contoso-git-workflow
plugins.description: Enforce Contoso Git branching strategy, commit message conventions, and PR workflow automation.

plugins.name: contoso-code-quality
plugins.description: Code quality enforcement with auto-fix for linting issues, formatting standards, and complexity checks.

plugins.name: contoso-secret-scanning
plugins.description: Detect and prevent secrets, API keys, passwords, and credentials from being committed to repositories.

plugins.name: contoso-ci-cd
plugins.description: Generate, validate, and optimize CI/CD pipeline configurations for GitHub Actions, Azure DevOps, and Jenkins.

plugins.name: contoso-testing
plugins.description: Generate unit, integration, and end-to-end tests with coverage tracking and test strategy guidance.

plugins.name: contoso-frontend
plugins.description: General frontend development expertise — UI component scaffolding, accessibility compliance, and responsive design patterns.

plugins.name: contoso-frontend-react
plugins.description: React-specific development — component patterns, hooks, state management, and Contoso React style guide enforcement.

plugins.name: contoso-frontend-angular
plugins.description: Angular-specific development — component/service generation, RxJS patterns, and Contoso Angular style guide enforcement.

plugins.name: contoso-backend
plugins.description: General backend and API development — REST/GraphQL API design, microservice patterns, and Contoso API conventions.

plugins.name: contoso-backend-java
plugins.description: Java and Spring Boot development — Maven/Gradle management, Spring patterns, and Contoso Java coding standards.

plugins.name: contoso-backend-dotnet
plugins.description: .NET and C# development — NuGet/MSBuild management, ASP.NET patterns, and Contoso .NET conventions.

plugins.name: contoso-backend-python
plugins.description: Python development — pip/Poetry management, FastAPI/Django patterns, and Contoso PEP standards enforcement.

plugins.name: contoso-backend-typescript
plugins.description: TypeScript and Node.js backend development — project configuration, Express/NestJS patterns, and strict typing enforcement.

plugins.name: contoso-infrastructure
plugins.description: Infrastructure-as-Code expertise — Terraform, Bicep, and CloudFormation generation with Contoso IaC best practices.

plugins.name: contoso-security
plugins.description: Application security — OWASP-based vulnerability scanning, dependency audits, and security review workflows.

plugins.name: contoso-mobile
plugins.description: Mobile development — cross-platform patterns, performance optimization, and mobile-specific UI guidelines.
